regions.text: How do these very complex materials come into being? The answer is, through the work of plants. Plants need sunlight. This is common knowledge within our experience.
Grow two bean seeds over glasses of water in a dark cupboard. After a few days take one into the daylight. Compare the two.

You will find that the plant in the light grows a strong stem and green leaves. within: inside. experience: knowledge we get as we live. experiment: doing something to get knowledge. bean: a common food plant.
